name: Looo (Basic Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil and simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Allow the sauce to cool before refrigerating.
4. When using, simmer your chosen foods in the sauce.
5. If the food absorbs too much saltiness, add more soy sauce as needed.
6. Avoid using fish with this sauce if you want it to last longer.
Basic Sauce is versatile and can be used repeatedly for slow-simmering various dishes, enhancing their flavor as they cook.
